metadata.description: Checks and balances triggered when operating margin is below industry benchmark
metadata.focus: Reduce OpEx, rationalize general & administrative, convert fixed costs to variable, and improve administrative/labor efficiency

universal_controls.title: Selling, General & Admin (SG&A) Variance & Overhead Audit
universal_controls.description: Split operating expenses into payroll, rent, utilities, marketing, and admin. Flag any line item more than 3% above historical baseline. Investigate bloat or misallocation.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Selling, General & Admin (SG&A) variance report + general & administrative root-cause log

universal_controls.title: Non-Essential Expense Freeze
universal_controls.description: Halt discretionary spending: travel, events, non-critical software, and external consultants. Require CFO approval for all operating expenses (OpEx) more than $500.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Expense freeze memo + approval threshold log

universal_controls.title: Fixed-to-Variable Cost Conversion
universal_controls.description: Shift non-core functions to outsourced or usage-based models. Renegotiate leases to percentage rent or short-term flex terms.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Vendor transition log + lease renegotiation tracker

universal_controls.title: Administrative Staff Optimization
universal_controls.description: Review support headcount vs revenue scale. Consolidate roles, implement shared services, or pause back-office hiring until margin normalizes.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Headcount review sheet + role consolidation log

controls.title: Overhead Absorption Review
controls.description: Track fixed manufacturing general & administrative per unit. Consolidate shifts or idle lines to improve absorption rates during low-volume periods.
controls.audit_trail: Absorption rate report + shift consolidation log

controls.title: Indirect Labor Rationalization
controls.description: Audit maintenance, Quality Assurance (QA), and material handling headcount. Cross-train or automate repetitive tasks to reduce non-direct labor costs.
controls.audit_trail: Indirect labor audit + cross-training tracker

controls.title: Store Payroll Optimization
controls.description: Align staff hours to traffic forecasts. Reduce manager layers and implement self-checkout to lower the cost of labor.
controls.audit_trail: Payroll optimization report + traffic vs staffing sheet

controls.title: Corporate Selling, General & Admin (SG&A) Reduction
controls.description: Consolidate regional offices, pause non-essential marketing, and renegotiate vendor contracts to lower corporate general & administrative.
controls.audit_trail: Selling, General & Admin (SG&A) reduction plan + vendor renegotiation log

controls.title: Non-Billable Work Freeze
controls.description: Halt internal Research & Development (R&D), training, and admin projects. Redirect all staff hours to client-facing billable work until margin recovers.
controls.audit_trail: Project freeze memo + billable utilization report

controls.title: Office Space & Lease Downsize
controls.description: Sublease unused space or shift to hybrid remote model. Negotiate rent abatements or early lease termination to reduce fixed general & administrative.
controls.audit_trail: Lease amendment log + occupancy cost reduction sheet

controls.title: Labor Hour Rationalization
controls.description: Cut non-essential shifts, reduce management layers, and implement strict overtime caps. Track the cost of labor daily.
controls.audit_trail: Labor cost report + overtime freeze log

controls.title: Utility & Energy Audit
controls.description: Identify high-cost utilities (HVAC, lighting, water). Implement immediate conservation measures and renegotiate supplier rates.
controls.audit_trail: Utility audit sheet + conservation implementation log

controls.title: Project Overhead Caps
controls.description: Limit general conditions to % of contract value. Reduce site trailers, temp utilities, and field admin costs immediately.
controls.audit_trail: Overhead cap sheet + site cost reduction log

controls.title: Equipment Lease Renegotiation
controls.description: Return underutilized rented equipment. Negotiate rate reductions or payment deferrals with lessors to lower monthly OpEx.
controls.audit_trail: Equipment return log + lease renegotiation tracker

controls.title: Idle Oven & Shift Consolidation
controls.description: Combine production runs to reduce idle heating time. Cut low-volume shifts and track labor/utility cost per batch.
controls.audit_trail: Shift consolidation log + utility cost tracker

controls.title: Admin & Delivery Route Optimization
controls.description: Consolidate back-office roles and optimize delivery routes to reduce fuel and driver overtime costs.
controls.audit_trail: Route optimization report + fuel cost log

controls.title: Service Bay Utilization Audit
controls.description: Track empty bay hours and technician idle time. Adjust scheduling and cross-train staff to improve labor absorption.
controls.audit_trail: Bay utilization report + scheduling adjustment log

controls.title: Fixed Overhead Reduction
controls.description: Cut non-essential marketing, pause facility upgrades, and renegotiate supplier terms to lower monthly operating costs.
controls.audit_trail: Expense freeze memo + supplier renegotiation log

controls.title: Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) & Cloud Subscription Audit
controls.description: Eliminate unused dev tools, staging environments, and redundant licenses. Switch to open-source or lower-tier plans where viable.
controls.audit_trail: Subscription audit log + cost reduction report

controls.title: Meeting & Admin Time Reduction
controls.description: Implement strict meeting caps and async communication. Redirect saved hours to billable client work.
controls.audit_trail: Meeting audit report + utilization uplift tracker

controls.title: Labor Scheduling vs Demand Alignment
controls.description: Cut staff hours during slow periods. Implement strict overtime caps and track the cost of labor daily.
controls.audit_trail: Labor cost report + schedule adjustment log

controls.title: Utility & Waste Cost Control
controls.description: Audit energy and water usage. Implement conservation measures and renegotiate waste hauler contracts to lower monthly general & administrative.
controls.audit_trail: Utility audit sheet + cost reduction tracker

controls.title: Site Overhead & Trailer Cost Reduction
controls.description: Consolidate job sites, reduce trailer rentals, and cut temp utilities. Track general conditions % vs contract value.
controls.audit_trail: Site cost reduction log + general & administrative variance report

controls.title: Superintendent Span Optimization
controls.description: Increase superintendent-to-project ratio. Use remote progress tracking to reduce field admin travel and time costs.
controls.audit_trail: Span analysis sheet + tech adoption report

controls.title: Staff Hour Optimization
controls.description: Align payroll to foot traffic. Reduce idle time, cut overtime, and implement self-checkout to lower the cost of labor.
controls.audit_trail: Payroll optimization report + labor cost tracker

controls.title: Marketing & Promo Spend Audit
controls.description: Eliminate low-Return on Investment (ROI) campaigns and pause non-essential promotions. Redirect budget to highest-margin products only.
controls.audit_trail: Campaign Return on Investment (ROI) dashboard + budget reallocation log

5412.title: Accounting, Tax Preparation, Bookkeeping, and Payroll Services

controls.title: Admin Staff Consolidation
controls.description: Review back-office headcount vs revenue. Consolidate roles, pause hiring, and implement shared services to lower Selling, General & Admin (SG&A).
controls.audit_trail: Headcount review sheet + role consolidation log

controls.title: Software Subscription Audit
controls.description: Eliminate redundant tax/prep software licenses. Switch to volume pricing or alternative platforms to reduce tech general & administrative.
controls.audit_trail: Software audit log + cost reduction report

controls.title: Departmental Expense Caps
controls.description: Implement zero-based budgeting for housekeeping, Food & Beverage (F&B), and admin. Track cost per occupied room and cut non-essential spending.
controls.audit_trail: Dept expense report + zero-based budget sheet

controls.title: Energy & Utility Optimization
controls.description: Install smart thermostats, LED lighting, and low-flow fixtures. Monitor utility cost per room and implement conservation protocols.
controls.audit_trail: Utility audit sheet + conservation implementation log
